ValidationRule.description: lead conversion by an LDR rep before it is handed over to another rep by changing the opportunity owner all the required fields
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
/* AND( NOT($Permission.C_PERM_8020_Bypass_Opp_V_RULE) , DateValue(CreatedDate) >= $Setup.CSET_9900__c.OppCutoverDate__c , fxRecordTypeName__c ="PKI SPI Sales Process" , CONTAINS($User.fxUserAttributes__c,"1000-LDR") , IsChanged(OwnerId) , OR( TEXT(Solution_Area_of_Interest__c)="" ,TEXT(Type)="" ,FIND("Why:", Description)-FIND("What:", Description)<=8 ,LEN(Description)-FIND("Why:", Description)<=4 ,ISBLANK(Product_Line_Name__c) ) ) */
AND( NOT($Permission.C_PERM_8020_Bypass_Opp_V_RULE) , DateValue(CreatedDate) >= $Setup.CSET_9900__c.OppCutoverDate__c , fxRecordTypeName__c ="PKI SPI Sales Process" , CONTAINS($User.fxUserAttributes__c,"1000-LDR") , IsChanged(OwnerId) , OR( TEXT(Solution_Area_of_Interest__c)="" ,TEXT(Type)="" ,ISBLANK(Product_Line_Name__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_OPP_078: LDR Reps, please Complete Solution Area of Interest, Type, Product Line Names, and Description (What & Why) before changing to a new owner.
